name: 7-up Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can crushed pineapple, drained and juice reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the lemon-flavored Jell-O in a bowl.
2. Add hot water to the Jell-O, then stir in the cold 7-UP until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch glass baking dish.
4. Drain the pineapple and reserve one cup of juice for topping.
5. Add the drained pineapple, sliced bananas, and marshmallows to the Jell-O mixture. Allow it to set completely until firm.
6. For the topping: In a saucepan combine one cup of reserved pineapple juice, sugar, flour, and slightly beaten egg. Cook until thickened.
7. Add butter to the saucepan and stir until combined. Remove from heat and let cool.
8. Prepare the Dream Whip according to package instructions.
9. Stir the cooled mixture into the Dream Whip.
10. Spread the Dream Whip topping over the set Jell-O before serving.
